close_reason: Added Solidity and Jsonnet language documentation
description:
The user manual's Language Support section currently covers:
- Go
- Rust
- Python
- TypeScript

We need to add documentation for:

**Solidity:**
- solidity_library rule
- solidity_contract rule  
- solidity_test rule (wraps forge test)
- Dependency management (npm packages + Foundry git deps)
- Auto-generated import remappings
- Per-target solc_version support

**Jsonnet:**
- jsonnet_library rule
- External variables (ext_strs, ext_codes)
- Top-level arguments (tla_strs, tla_codes)
- Import paths and dependencies
- Using jrsonnet (Rust implementation) for speed

**Files to create:**
- docs/user-manual/src/languages/solidity.md
- docs/user-manual/src/languages/jsonnet.md

**Files to update:**
- docs/user-manual/src/SUMMARY.md (add to Language Support section)
title: Add Solidity and Jsonnet to language support documentation
